name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology for Claude Code. v3.0 introduces the 12-Part Strategy Flow — the canonical sequential engagement workflow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), the Two-Views Model (v1 unbiased + v2 client-validated), the Decision Matrix for selective re-runs, the Update-Back Rule for in-life corrections, and the Living Project Instruction File. Includes 22 strategic-framework reference docs (Five Digital Markets, Channel Families, In-Market vs Out-Market, Multi-Dimensional Decision Framework, Unit Economics, Actionable Persona Format, B2B Decision-Making Unit, Three-Scenario Forecasting, 30/60/90 Framework, Reporting Cadence, India Market Context, more). Builds on v2.7's 25 specialist agents, 141 atomic skills, 65 Python scripts, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, and 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.
